---
title: "Lab 2: Spatial Analysis and Visualization"
subtitle: "Healthcare Access and Equity in Pennsylvania"
author: "Chen Yitao"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output: true
#| include: true
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(tigris)
library(tidycensus)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(here)

raw <- read_csv(
  "C:/Users/cheny/Desktop/PPA Mid Data/opa_properties_public.csv") 

clean <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    sale_year = lubridate::year(sale_date)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    dplyr::between(sale_year, 2023, 2024),
    category_code_description %in% c("SINGLE FAMILY", "MULTI FAMILY"),
    mailing_city_state == "PHILADELPHIA PA",
    number_of_bathrooms > 0,
    number_of_bedrooms  > 0,
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(sale_price, sale_date) %>%
  filter(sale_price > 10000)

ggplot(clean, aes(x = sale_price)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Sale Price (log scale)",
    x = "Sale Price ($, log10 scale)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
